data.description:
## Finding (S11 — verified)
`gate_dispatch.py` is a new 778-LOC file (22 under cap) containing a 144-LOC, 11-param `produce_code_review_verdict`.

Citations: `src/rebar/llm/workflow/gate_dispatch.py:459` (produce_code_review_verdict, 144 LOC, 11 params).

## Remediation
Group the 11 params into a `CodeReviewRequest` dataclass and extract the verdict-assembly phases into helpers, dropping the function well under 100 LOC — which also pulls the file off the cap edge WITHOUT a file split (preferred over splitting a cohesive dispatcher).

cascade_flag: changes `produce_code_review_verdict` signature (11 params -> request object) — check callers.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `produce_code_review_verdict` takes one request object and is a short orchestrator over phase helpers
- [ ] `gate_dispatch.py` has comfortable headroom under the cap (no file split needed)
- [ ] Behavior unchanged (tests green)
data.title: Decompose produce_code_review_verdict (request object + phase helpers)
